name: coupon-apply
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/billing.js, dispatch key 'billing.coupon-apply'); SubscriptionBillingSuite calls it via lensRun. In-memory per-user state. amount routes through billNum (non-finite → 0) and the coupon value is clamped at create (percent ≤ 100, fixed round2-clamped), so discount is min(amount, value)/percentage and finalAmount = amount − discount stays FINITE and ≥ 0 — fail-CLOSED. The assassin's fresh state has no coupons, so every fuzz call rejects ok:false with a string error ('invalid coupon code' / 'value …'). Pinned by server/tests/billing-lens-macros.test.js (exact 20%/fixed discount math + maxRedemptions deactivation + poison amount).
